  • [ - ] 123Football - member since 03-Jan-23

    Auxerre has lost just once at home this season and remains unbeaten at home since November 2024. While they are winless in their last 9 overall, but their home form remains strong despite facing top teams like PSG, Lille, Lens, and Nice. Toulouse is competitive away but unpredictable. Backing Auxerre to avoid defeat is the safer bet.
